channel.title: JLT Travel Collection
channel.description: Featured offers from JLT Group's travel partners

item.title: ✨ Cruise Spotlight: Idyllic Greece, 7 Nights Across Greece and Turkey 🚢
item.description:
✨ Cruise Spotlight: Idyllic Greece, 7 Nights Across Greece and Turkey 🚢
Seven nights, seven ports, two countries: a cruise across the Aegean aboard the Celestyal Journey that pairs overnight stops in Santorini and Mykonos with a guided journey to ancient Ephesus. Departing Athens (Piraeus) at 17:00 during the 2026 season, this is an itinerary that lets you settle into each port rather than glance at it.
Perfect if you've been searching for a holiday where the days feel full but the planning feels done. 🌅
✨ What makes this special: → Overnight stays in both Santorini and Mykonos so you can experience each island after the day-trippers leave 🌅 → Guided excursion to ancient Ephesus from Kusadasi, Turkey, walking through one of the best-preserved cities of the ancient world 🌍 → Visit to the medieval Acropolis of Lindos in Rhodes, perched above whitewashed villages and a sweeping bay 🏰 → Time on volcanic Milos with its dramatic rock formations and turquoise coves 🏖️ → All-inclusive dining onboard with breakfast, lunch and dinner included 🍽️ → Essential WiFi, port fees and gratuities included from the start, with no add-ons to manage later ⚓
Ideal for couples planning a slower, more cultural week away, families wanting variety without daily packing and unpacking, and travellers who want history and Greek-island life in one trip. You can also extend the experience by combining it with the Heavenly Greece, Italy and Croatia itinerary.
*7 nights, 7 ports, 2 countries, all-inclusive onboard* 🚢
Ready to set sail? ⚓ Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#CelestyalCruises #GreekIslands #AegeanCruise #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Property Spotlight: Sayari Camp, Northern Serengeti 🌍
item.description:
✨ Property Spotlight: Sayari Camp, Northern Serengeti 🌍
Sayari Camp sits in prime position in the northern Serengeti, where the plains stretch out and the wildlife calendar runs all year. From July to October, the surrounding rivers become the stage for the Great Migration crossings, one of the most extraordinary sights in nature.
Perfect if you've been searching for a wild, intimate safari with the comforts of a true home in the bush. 🌅
✨ What makes this special: → Fifteen spacious tented suites with mahogany floors, fine linens and a choice of king or twin beds 🛏️ → En suite bathrooms with freestanding tubs overlooking the savannah and private outdoor showers on every deck 💆‍♀️ → Infinity pool with panoramic views across the Serengeti plains 🏊‍♀️ → Twice-daily game drives with expert guides tracking lion, leopard, cheetah, black rhino and the full Big Five 🌍 → Walking safaris through the wilderness available June to January 👣 → Hot air balloon safaris, spa treatments and campfire sundowners on offer 🌅
Open June through March and welcoming children aged five and over. Ideal for honeymooners, couples and families looking for a year-round wildlife escape, with two private Retreat suites available for those wanting their own chef and guide.
*Fifteen tented suites in one of the Serengeti's most celebrated locations* 🌍
Ready to escape to the wild heart of Tanzania? 🌅 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#Serengeti #Tanzania #SafariHoliday #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: Lake Como, St Moritz & the Bernina Express, Northern Italy & Switzerland 🌍
item.description:
✨ Escape Spotlight: Lake Como, St Moritz & the Bernina Express, Northern Italy & Switzerland 🌍
Eight days that pair the Italian Lakes with the snow-capped Engadin, all from a comfortable lakeside hotel in Tremezzo with views across to Bellagio. You travel with a small group and an expert Tour Manager, so the logistics are handled and you can focus on the scenery.
Perfect if you've been searching for a classic Alpine and Italian Lakes pairing in one trip. 🚆
✨ What makes this special: → A scenic ride aboard the Bernina Express, a UNESCO World Heritage railway through the Swiss Alps 🚆 → A guided day in Stresa on Lake Maggiore with the Baroque gardens of Isola Bella 🌿 → A private lake cruise to Bellagio with a visit to Villa del Balbianello 🛥️ → Time in Lugano, the elegant Swiss lakeside city 📍 → A day in St Moritz, the celebrated mountain resort in the Engadin 🏔️ → Return flights, UK regional airport options and half board throughout 🍽️
A small group of up to 36 guests, with multiple departures from June to September 2026 (and 2027 dates also available). Ideal for couples, scenery and railway lovers, and anyone who wants the lakes and the Alps in one itinerary.
*8 days from £1,779 per person, two sharing* 🗓️
Ready for the adventure of a lifetime? 🌍 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#LakeComo #StMoritz #BerninaExpress #EscortedTours #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Experience Spotlight: Enchanting Lapland, Enontekio 🎉
item.description:
✨ Experience Spotlight: Enchanting Lapland, Enontekio 🎉
A day trip into the Arctic snowscapes of Finnish Lapland, with award-winning Jet2 flights from your choice of UK airport and every activity included in the price. Departures run from 27 November through 23 December 2026, giving you a proper window to plan a festive family escape.
Perfect if you've been searching for a magical Christmas day out without the commitment of an overnight stay. 🌟
✨ What makes this special: → Private Santa meeting in an authentic Lapland forest with a personalised gift and souvenir certificate 🎅 → Husky and reindeer sleigh rides through the Arctic snow 🦌 → Unlimited tobogganing with Stiga sleds and snowmobile driving for adults and juniors ❄️ → Visit to an ice igloo with hot berry juice served inside 🏔️ → Full thermal snow suits and Arctic boots provided for the duration 🧥 → All meals included plus a hot dinner served on the return flight 🍽️
Around 5.5–6 hours on the ground in Lapland, with departures from Birmingham, Manchester, Glasgow, Gatwick and Dublin. Ideal for families with young children and couples who want a festive Arctic experience in a single day.
*From £729 per adult and £649 per child, 100% ATOL protected with no hidden extras* ✨
Ready to step into a Lapland Christmas? 🎄 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#Lapland #ChristmasInLapland #FamilyHolidays #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: Antarctica Aurora Australis - The Southern Lights, Antarctica 🌍
item.description:
✨ Escape Spotlight: Antarctica Aurora Australis - The Southern Lights, Antarctica 🌍
Fifteen nights aboard an ice-strengthened polar expedition vessel, sailing below the Antarctic Circle during the peak of the sun's 11-year solar cycle. This is the rare voyage where the Southern Lights become the headline act, not a hopeful footnote.
Perfect if you've been searching for genuine wilderness travel with real scientific depth. 🌅
✨ What makes this special: → High chances of seeing the Aurora Australis during its peak solar cycle 🌅 → Journey below the Antarctic Circle to rarely explored ice shelves and islands 🌍 → Spot humpback and minke whales, leopard seals, Adélie and gentoo penguins 🐧 → Explore abandoned British research stations and famous explorer huts 📍 → Voyage aboard MV Ortelius, an ice-strengthened polar expedition ship with open-bridge policy 🚢 → All meals, shore excursions, Zodiac activities, and expert naturalist lectures included 🎟️
A 15-night March departure from Ushuaia, the southernmost city in the world, with night-sky sessions led by astronomer and physicist Dr. Tyler Nordgren. Ideal for serious travellers who want the Antarctic and the aurora in one voyage.
*15 nights below the Antarctic Circle during the solar cycle's peak* 🌅
Ready to witness the Southern Lights from the edge of the polar wilderness? Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
#Antarctica #PolarExpedition #AuroraAustralis #ExpeditionCruise #TheJLTCollection

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: Jewels of Japan
item.description:
✨ Escape Spotlight: Jewels of Japan
Picture yourself gliding through Japan's storied landscapes by bullet train, from neon-lit Tokyo to the serene torii gates of Miyajima, soaking in the country's most iconic sights across eleven days of temples, gardens and cultural encounters.
✨ What makes this special: → Explore Tokyo's Imperial Palace, Sensoji Temple and the towering Tokyo Skytree → Ascend Mount Fuji's 5th Station for sweeping panoramic views of Japan's most sacred peak → Ride the legendary Shinkansen bullet train through Japan's iconic landscapes to Kyoto → Wander Kyoto's Golden Pavilion, Kiyomizu Temple and the 10,000 red torii gates of Fushimi Inari → Try your hand at traditional soba noodle-making and a Japanese tea ceremony → Fully inclusive: 9 breakfasts, 8 lunches, 9 dinners, international flights, visa fees, rail passes and all entrance fees
Eleven days of Japan's finest moments, from £5,790 per person with departures running through to December 2027. Discover more and reserve your place.
📩 bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk
#TheJLTCollection #JewelsOfJapan #JapanTour #WendyWuTours #BulletTrainJourney

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: Classic Japan by Train, Tokyo to Kyoto 🚄
item.description:
✨ Escape Spotlight: Classic Japan by Train, Tokyo to Kyoto 🚄
Fourteen days across Japan by bullet train, linking Tokyo's neon energy to Kyoto's geisha quarters, Hiroshima's Peace Park, and a hot spring under Mount Fuji. A tailor-made itinerary that lets you see the country the way the Japanese do… on the Shinkansen.
Perfect if you want depth and pace in equal measure, without the logistics. 🗾
✨ What makes this special: → Bullet train journeys linking Tokyo, Tsumago, Hiroshima, Kyoto and Hakone 🚄 → Guided Tokyo exploration with an evening of local dining in Ebisu 🍶 → Walk the historic Nakasendo Highway through the Kiso Valley, once travelled by samurai and traders 🏯 → Hiroshima's Peace Park and the floating torii gate on Miyajima Island ⛩️ → Kyoto's Gion Geisha Quarter and iconic gardens at dusk with a local guide 🌸 → Soak in a Hakone hot spring with Mount Fuji views 🗻
A 14-day tailor-made itinerary suited to couples, solo travellers, cultural explorers, and multi-generational families. All accommodation, in-destination transfers, activities, and 24-hour in-country support are included, with international flights from a choice of UK airports.
*From £6,895 per person, including international flights from London, Birmingham, Manchester or Edinburgh* 🎌
Ready to see Japan the way it was meant to be travelled? 🚄 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
**#Japan #BulletTrain #LuxuryTravel #CulturalTravel #TheJLTCollection**

item.title: ✨ Cruise Spotlight: Secrets of Egypt & the Nile, Nile 🌍
item.description:
✨ Cruise Spotlight: Secrets of Egypt & the Nile, Nile 🌍
Eleven nights on the Nile, exploring temples that have stood for millennia. From the Valley of the Kings to Karnak's sacred columns, this is where ancient Egypt reveals itself in full.
History comes alive when you're floating past it. 🏛️
✨ What makes this special: → 11-night river cruise exploring the Nile's ancient wonders 🛥️ → Valley of the Kings and Queens — temples, tombs, and timeless history 👑 → Sacred sites including Karnak, Luxor, and Hathor temples 🏛️ → Nubian culture and sacred waters at Aswan 🌊 → Intimate vessels with just 36–82 passengers 🧳 → Return flights from London or Manchester included 🛫
Departs June through October 2026–2027, with roundtrip Cairo experiences. Ideal for history enthusiasts, cultural explorers, and families seeking substance over pace.
*Eleven nights immersed in ancient Egypt, from £4,442 per person* ✨
Ready to journey through time on the Nile? ⭐ Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
**#TheJLTCollection #Egypt #NileRiver #RiverCruise #AncientEgypt**

item.title: ✨ Property Spotlight: Villa Dada, Lake Como 🏰
item.description:
✨ Property Spotlight: Villa Dada, Lake Como 🏰
Eight bedrooms overlooking Italy's most dramatic lake, with a private dock and heated pool set in serene lakefront gardens. Villa Dada is built for groups seeking both space and tranquility on the shores of Lake Como.
Perfect if you've been searching for a lakefront estate where everyone has room to breathe — and the water's right there. 🌊
✨ What makes this special: → Eight bedrooms and eight bathrooms (expandable to ten with annex) 🛏️ → Private heated swimming pool and lakefront gardens 🏊‍♀️ → Private dock with direct lake access 🌊 → Tennis court and two game rooms 🎾 → Children's playground and serene park-like setting 👶 → Sleeps 16–20 guests comfortably across four floors 👑
Sleeps up to twenty guests across eight bedrooms, ideal for multi-generational families, friend groups, and celebrations requiring space and privacy. The serene grounds and private dock create a retreat within reach of Lake Como's towns.
*Twenty guests across lakefront grounds with private dock and heated pool* 🌅
Ready to escape to your own lakefront sanctuary? 🌅 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
**#LakeComo #VillaRental #LuxuryTravel #FamilyGetaway #TheJLTCollection**

item.title: ✨ Cruise Spotlight: A Journey Through Mythical Isles & Captivating Shores, Greece to Türkiye 🚢
item.description:
✨ Cruise Spotlight: A Journey Through Mythical Isles & Captivating Shores, Greece to Türkiye 🚢
Seven nights aboard EXPLORA II, sailing from Piraeus to Istanbul with calls at Nafplio, Paros, Skiathos, Volos and Kusadasi. A small-ship voyage through the Aegean built around culinary depth, wellness and genuine inclusions.
Perfect if you've been searching for a Mediterranean cruise where the ship matters as much as the destinations. 🌅
✨ What makes this special: → 7-night voyage from Piraeus (Athens) to Istanbul aboard EXPLORA II ⚓ → Port calls at Nafplio, Paros, Skiathos, Volos and Kusadasi for Ephesus 📍 → Nine distinct culinary experiences including In-Suite Dining 🍽️ → Unlimited premium beverages included throughout the voyage 🌟 → Ocean Wellness spa access included for every guest 💆‍♀️ → Complimentary Wi-Fi, onboard gratuities and shuttle services from all ports 💡
Sailing 6 to 13 September 2027 across some of the Mediterranean's most storied shores. Ideal for couples planning a milestone voyage or close groups travelling together in considered comfort.
*Seven nights, five ports and nine dining venues across the Aegean* 🚢
Ready to set sail? ⚓ Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
**#ExploraJourneys #LuxuryCruise #Mediterranean #AegeanSea #TheJLTCollection**

item.title: ✨ Property Spotlight: Ikos Odisia, Corfu 🏝️
item.description:
✨ Property Spotlight: Ikos Odisia, Corfu 🏝️
Sixty acres on a secluded bay on Corfu's east coast, with eight restaurants, ten heated pools, and a privately serviced beach on Dassia Bay. Ikos Odisia takes the all-inclusive Greek-island holiday and rebuilds it around proper food, real freedom, and a daily rhythm that fits your group.
Perfect if you've been looking for an island stay where everything is included but nothing feels generic. 🌸
✨ What makes this special: → Eight restaurants including Flavors, Fresco, Oliva, Ouzo, Anaya, Azul and Elia with menus shaped by Michelin-starred chefs 🍽️ → Dine Out programme at handpicked local Corfiot restaurants away from the resort, fully included in your stay 🍷 → Local Drive Adventure with a complimentary electric MINI Countryman to explore the island at your own pace 🌍 → Ten heated pools, splash parks and a privately serviced beach on Dassia Bay 🏊‍♀️ → Ikos Spa by Anne Semonin with thermal suites, plus tennis, mountain biking and paddleboarding on tap 💆‍♀️ → Heroes Crèche, Kids Club and Just4Teens with Ofsted-standard childcare for younger and older children 👶
Twenty minutes from Corfu Airport, with new Deluxe Three- and Four-Bedroom Bungalow Villas for 2026 designed around multi-generational families. Ideal for couples, families with children of any age, and larger groups travelling together.
*Sixty acres on the Ionian, eight restaurants, ten heated pools and a privately serviced beach* 🌸
Ready to escape to your own private sanctuary? 🌸 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
**#Corfu #Greece #AllInclusiveLuxury #FamilyTravel #TheJLTCollection**

item.title: ✨ Cruise Spotlight: Spirit of Antarctica, Antarctica 🚢
item.description:
✨ Cruise Spotlight: Spirit of Antarctica, Antarctica 🚢
Twelve days on the white continent aboard a brand-new polar expedition ship, with a Science Centre on board and a marine biologist running workshops as you sail. Spirit of Antarctica is a special-edition voyage in partnership with New Scientist Discovery Tours, built for travellers who like their wildlife encounters paired with proper science.
Perfect if you've been waiting for the right reason to head to the Antarctic Peninsula. 🌸
✨ What makes this special: → Twelve-day expedition departing Ushuaia, sailing the Drake Passage to the Antarctic Peninsula 🌍 → Hosted aboard the Douglas Mawson, a new small ship built in 2025 with the Ulstein X-BOW design 🚢 → Maximum 130 guests, with generous viewing space and a quieter cruising experience 👑 → Zodiac cruising and sea kayaking among icebergs, penguin colonies, and resting seals 🛶 → Onboard Science Centre plus polar science workshops led by a marine biologist 🔬 → Educational lecture programme during Drake Passage crossings, with seabird viewing from deck 🦅
Maximum 130 guests across departures running December 2026 through February 2028. Ideal for curious-minded couples, friends, and solo travellers who want to explore Antarctica with like-minded company.
*Twelve days on the Antarctic Peninsula aboard a 130-guest expedition ship* 🚢
Ready to set sail? ⚓ Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
**#Antarctica #ExpeditionCruise #PolarTravel #TheJLTCollection**

item.title: ✨ Property Spotlight: Six Senses Zil Pasyon, Félicité Island 🏝️
item.description:
✨ Property Spotlight: Six Senses Zil Pasyon, Félicité Island 🏝️
The only resort on its own private island in the Seychelles, with three pristine beaches, an infinity pool in every villa, and boat transfers connecting you to Praslin, La Digue, and the inner island group. Six Senses Zil Pasyon is built for travellers who want a true island base without giving up the option to explore.
Perfect if you've been searching for proper seclusion with the freedom to island-hop on a whim. 🌊
✨ What makes this special: → Sole resort on Félicité Island for a fully private island experience 🏝️ → Three pristine beaches set against dramatic tropical landscapes 🏖️ → Private infinity pool in every villa and residence 🏊‍♀️ → Five restaurants and bars across diverse dining experiences 🍽️ → Full-service spa and wellness centre with a comprehensive treatment menu 💆‍♀️ → Island-hopping to Grande Soeur, Petite Soeur, Coco, and Marianne via regular boat transfers 🌊
Available on a Bed & Breakfast or Half Board basis, with a kids club for children aged 4–11 and a fitness centre on site. Ideal for couples, honeymooners, families, and island-hopping adventurers who want one quiet base for the whole trip.
*One resort, one private island, and three pristine beaches in the inner Seychelles* 🏖️
Ready to escape to your own private island? 🌅 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
**#Seychelles #SixSenses #PrivateIsland #LuxuryTravel #TheJLTCollection**

item.title: ✨ Escape Spotlight: Local Living Italy - Amalfi Coast 🌊
item.description:
✨ Escape Spotlight: Local Living Italy - Amalfi Coast 🌊
Eight days based in a converted 16th-century monastery agriturismo above the Amalfi Coast, with the Path of the Gods, Pompeii, and a Naples food tour woven into the week. Small group travel capped at sixteen, so the pace stays relaxed and the dinner table stays personal.
Perfect if you've been wanting the Amalfi Coast at walking pace, not bus-window speed. 🥾
✨ What makes this special: → Six nights in a renovated 16th-century monastery agriturismo with ensuite rooms and rural views 🏛️ → Path of the Gods hike above lemon groves, gorges, and the Mediterranean 🥾 → Guided tour of Pompeii, frozen in time since 79 AD 🌋 → Mount Tre Calli hike through woodland and open slopes down to the sea 🌿 → Naples food tour on Day 2 and a hands-on cooking demonstration on Day 6 🍝 → Seven breakfasts and six dinners included throughout 🍽️
Maximum sixteen travellers, average group size twelve, with departures running June 2026 through October 2027. Suits hikers, foodies, and culture-led travellers: couples, solo travellers, and families with children aged 12+ all welcome.
*Eight days, six nights in a 16th-century monastery, two coastal hikes, one Pompeii morning* 🌅
Ready to swap day-trip Amalfi for the slow, lived-in version? 🌍 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
**#AmalfiCoast #ItalyTravel #SmallGroupTravel #LocalLiving #TheJLTCollection**

item.title: ✨ Property Spotlight: Davvi Arctic Lodge, Finnish Lapland 🌌
item.description:
✨ Property Spotlight: Davvi Arctic Lodge, Finnish Lapland 🌌
A modest hillside lodge on the Official Northern Lights Route, where glass cabins let you watch the aurora dance from bed. Set in the border village of Karesuando, with reindeer reserves and active Sami culture as your nearest neighbours.
Perfect if you've been searching for an authentic Lapland escape rather than a polished resort experience. ❄️
✨ What makes this special: → Glass cabin accommodation built for northern lights viewing from bed 🌌 → Circular restaurant inspired by traditional Sami reindeer corral design 🍽️ → Panoramic views across snow-covered terrain toward Swedish Lapland 🌅 → Positioned on the Official Northern Lights Route 📍 → Set among reindeer reserves with active Sami culture nearby 🌿 → Husky sledding and real snow igloo construction on the doorstep 🛷
Available from the festive Christmas period through aurora season from January onwards, roughly one hour from Enontekio Airport. Ideal for families chasing a magical Lapland Christmas, couples planning a winter escape, or aurora hunters who want to be on the right hillside at the right time.
*Secluded hillside cabins directly on the Official Northern Lights Route* 📍
Ready to escape to your own slice of Arctic stillness? 🌌 Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk 📩
**#FinnishLapland #NorthernLights #LaplandChristmas #AuroraHunting #TheJLTCollection**
